properties.name: b2b.public-base-url
properties.description: Public frontend base URL for Product Data API links.

properties.name: b2b.api-base-path
properties.description: Versioned REST API base path.

properties.name: b2b.credits.unit-eur
properties.description: Euro value of one credit.

properties.name: b2b.credits.free-grant-credits
properties.description: One-time free credits granted to a newly provisioned organization.

properties.name: b2b.price.freshness-days
properties.description: Maximum age of an offer, in days, for the price facet to be billable.

properties.name: b2b.request-ids.prefix
properties.description: Prefix used for generated request identifiers.

properties.name: b2b.redis.balance-ttl
properties.description: TTL for Redis hot balance mirror keys.

properties.name: b2b.redis.apikey-cache-ttl
properties.description: TTL for Redis API key lookup cache entries.

properties.name: b2b.redis.usage-stream-maxlen
properties.description: Approximate maximum Redis usage stream length.

properties.name: b2b.redis.reconcile-interval
properties.description: Default interval for balance reconciliation work.

properties.name: b2b.redis.fail-closed
properties.description: Whether metered endpoints fail closed when Redis is unavailable.

properties.name: b2b.ratelimit.requests-per-minute
properties.description: Default per-API-key request limit per minute.

properties.name: b2b.ratelimit.window
properties.description: Rate-limit counter window duration.

properties.name: b2b.hardener.cron
properties.description: Cron expression for the Redis/Postgres hardener batch.

properties.name: b2b.hardener.stream-batch-size
properties.description: Maximum Redis usage stream entries drained per hardener run.

properties.name: b2b.hardener.lock-at-least-for
properties.description: Minimum ShedLock duration for one hardener run.

properties.name: b2b.hardener.lock-at-most-for
properties.description: Maximum ShedLock duration for one hardener run.

properties.name: b2b.security.allowed-origins
properties.description: Origins allowed to call browser-facing endpoints.

properties.name: b2b.security.admin-emails
properties.description: Email allowlist whose users are flagged as platform administrators during provisioning.

properties.name: b2b.security.cookie-domain
properties.description: Domain attribute used for dashboard authentication cookies.

properties.name: b2b.security.cookie-secure
properties.description: Whether dashboard authentication cookies include the Secure attribute.

properties.name: b2b.security.cookie-same-site
properties.description: SameSite attribute used for dashboard authentication cookies.

properties.name: b2b.security.jwt-secret
properties.description: HS256 signing secret for dashboard JWTs. Must be provided from secrets outside local development.

properties.name: b2b.security.access-token-ttl
properties.description: Dashboard access-token lifetime.

properties.name: b2b.security.refresh-token-ttl
properties.description: Dashboard refresh-token lifetime.

properties.name: b2b.security.oidc.google.client-id
properties.description: Google OIDC client id.

properties.name: b2b.security.oidc.google.jwks-uri
properties.description: Google OIDC JWKS endpoint.

properties.name: b2b.security.oidc.microsoft.client-id
properties.description: Microsoft OIDC client id.

properties.name: b2b.security.oidc.microsoft.jwks-uri
properties.description: Microsoft OIDC JWKS endpoint.

properties.name: b2b.security.oidc.github.api-base-url
properties.description: GitHub API base URL used for OAuth userinfo verification.

properties.name: b2b.security.oidc.apple.client-id
properties.description: Apple OIDC client id.

properties.name: b2b.security.oidc.apple.jwks-uri
properties.description: Apple OIDC JWKS endpoint.

properties.name: b2b.stripe.secret-key
properties.description: Stripe secret API key for billing integration.

properties.name: b2b.stripe.webhook-secret
properties.description: Stripe webhook endpoint signing secret.
